items.summary: When a Student Coordinator successfully registers (profile is created with role 'StudentCoordinator'), the backend must automatically create an in-app notification for every existing faculty account. The notification message must indicate that a new Student Coordinator account is pending approval, including the coordinator's name and email. This notification creation must happen inside the profile registration logic in the main actor.

In the NotificationsDashboard component, faculty users must see pending Student Coordinator approval notifications rendered with the coordinator's name, email, and Approve / Reject action buttons. When a faculty member approves or rejects, the coordinator's verification status must be updated and the notification must be marked as resolved (removed or dismissed) for all faculty accounts.

Add or update a backend method (e.g., resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications) that, when any faculty member approves or rejects a pending Student Coordinator, removes or marks as resolved the corresponding verification-request notification for ALL faculty principals — not just the acting faculty member.
